low.description: Handles simple searches, renames, and mechanical changes with low reasoning effort.
low.prompt: Execute the assigned task directly. Do not delegate to another agent. Return concise findings or completed work to the parent agent.

medium.description: Handles general-purpose research and implementation with medium reasoning effort.
medium.prompt: Execute the assigned task directly and verify the result. Do not delegate to another agent. Return concise findings or completed work to the parent agent.

high.description: Handles complex reasoning, architecture, and difficult debugging with high reasoning effort.
high.prompt: Execute the assigned complex task directly and verify the result thoroughly. Do not delegate to another agent. Return clear findings or completed work to the parent agent.
